judge_text:
<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "5, ['Equipment Rental Coverage add-on (priced per gear value) — no field for rental equipment or per-gear pricing', 'Home Office Protection add-on (data recovery, remote work coverage) — no field for home office or data recovery coverage', 'Optimization advice to align coverage start dates to avoid overlap (financial timing optimization guidance, not a coverage field)', 'Request to cancel an existing external policy (BackpackerSafe Basic) — no cancellation control action field', 'Reference to freelancer compliance and German regulatory standards — no compliance certification or jurisdictional validation field']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "18, ['Health coverage plan options including monthly cost, deductible percentage, telemedicine, mental health, gym reimbursement, preventive care, psychiatry', 'Property coverage options with luxury items, electronics, liability, and monthly cost', 'Travel coverage options with adventure sports, medical evacuation, trip cancellation, baggage protection', 'Adventure Travel Coverage add-on with specialized rescue and glacier activity coverage', 'Premium Medical Network add-on with global hospital access', '24/7 Travel Assistance daily rate (maps to specialized_coverage.travel_assistance_daily_rate)', 'Coverage tiers (standard, premium)', 'Coverage limits (e.g., €500,000 evacuation limit)', 'Deductible amounts and percentages', 'Emergency support availability (24/7)', 'Global coverage and multilingual support', 'Family coverage availability (yes/no)', 'Policy start and transition dates (policy_timeline.new_coverage_start, transition_period_needed)', 'Cancellation policy (flexible, standard, strict)', 'Cost analysis with monthly and annual totals', 'Geographic coverage (Germany, Iceland expedition)', 'Implementation scheduling via insurance toolkit (binding_confirmation, implementation_ready)', 'Confirmation and binding issuance (confirmation_status fields)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 5, ['Equipment Rental Coverage add-on (priced per gear value) — no field for rental equipment or per-gear pricing', 'Home Office Protection add-on (data recovery, remote work coverage) — no field for home office or data recovery coverage', 'Optimization advice to align coverage start dates to avoid overlap (financial timing optimization guidance, not a coverage field)', 'Request to cancel an existing external policy (BackpackerSafe Basic) — no cancellation control action field', 'Reference to freelancer compliance and German regulatory standards — no compliance certification or jurisdictional validation field']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 18, ['Health coverage plan options including monthly cost, deductible percentage, telemedicine, mental health, gym reimbursement, preventive care, psychiatry', 'Property coverage options with luxury items, electronics, liability, and monthly cost', 'Travel coverage options with adventure sports, medical evacuation, trip cancellation, baggage protection', 'Adventure Travel Coverage add-on with specialized rescue and glacier activity coverage', 'Premium Medical Network add-on with global hospital access', '24/7 Travel Assistance daily rate (maps to specialized_coverage.travel_assistance_daily_rate)', 'Coverage tiers (standard, premium)', 'Coverage limits (e.g., €500,000 evacuation limit)', 'Deductible amounts and percentages', 'Emergency support availability (24/7)', 'Global coverage and multilingual support', 'Family coverage availability (yes/no)', 'Policy start and transition dates (policy_timeline.new_coverage_start, transition_period_needed)', 'Cancellation policy (flexible, standard, strict)', 'Cost analysis with monthly and annual totals', 'Geographic coverage (Germany, Iceland expedition)', 'Implementation scheduling via insurance toolkit (binding_confirmation, implementation_ready)', 'Confirmation and binding issuance (confirmation_status fields)']

indescribable_items: Equipment Rental Coverage add-on (priced per gear value) — no field for rental equipment or per-gear pricing
Home Office Protection add-on (data recovery, remote work coverage) — no field for home office or data recovery coverage
Optimization advice to align coverage start dates to avoid overlap (financial timing optimization guidance, not a coverage field)
Request to cancel an existing external policy (BackpackerSafe Basic) — no cancellation control action field
Reference to freelancer compliance and German regulatory standards — no compliance certification or jurisdictional validation field

Property coverage options with luxury items, electronics, liability, and monthly cost
Travel coverage options with adventure sports, medical evacuation, trip cancellation, baggage protection
Adventure Travel Coverage add-on with specialized rescue and glacier activity coverage
Premium Medical Network add-on with global hospital access
Policy start and transition dates (policy_timeline.new_coverage_start, transition_period_needed)
Cost analysis with monthly and annual totals
Implementation scheduling via insurance toolkit (binding_confirmation, implementation_ready)
